verdict_summary: 7th iteration chat_id fix did NOT resolve silent drop — bot bubble shows only loading dots (...) for 40+ seconds with no Korean text rendered, matching #726/#729/#746/#775 regression pattern.

evidence.console_errors_excerpt: Not captured (DevTools Network panel was open showing 14/2031 requests static — no new generation request completion observed during 40s wait)

recommendation: chat_id extraction hypothesis NOT confirmed by this run. Bundle still silent-drops add_turn even with c2s-extracted chat_id. Possible causes to investigate next: (1) chat_id was actually successfully extracted but bundle expects a different field name/format/location, (2) the engine code path was not actually triggered — verify via etap logs that build_character_add_turn_envelope was called WITH chat_id_override populated for run_id 20260508-144211-95440, (3) chat-tree resolver requires additional fields besides chat_id (e.g., turn_id parent reference, primary_candidate_id linkage). Recommend pulling Etap-side logs for this run to confirm extracted chat_id value matches the active session UUID before designing iteration 8.
notes: User-side test PC behavior identical to prior 6 iterations: prompt sent, user bubble visible with HealthyWorm4019 author label, Emo Boy reply slot shows persistent loading-dots placeholder, no SSE/event-stream completion observed in Network panel during full 40s wait window (well beyond 30s verify_timeout_s). RRN absent confirms S2 holds (no structural decode regression). Total elapsed for entire test under 3 minutes per mission constraint.
